sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Nun'takna tui pi tung ah huih nun'ciang in
Lung man'na van gik bang in na thuak ngei hiam.
Mi dangte a sum a paai na et ciang in
Zeisu kiangah sun in na lung kiat ciang in
Singlamteh hong pua sak in a gik thei hiam.
Thupha khat nungah khat na ngaihsun in
Vantung khua sungah na omna hi zong
kuamah in lei zo kei sum a om ding hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Thu pha khat nungah khat ngaihsun in
A tampi hong pia in thei ta in.
Thu pha khat nungah khat ngaihsun in
Pasian in a tampi hong pia thei ta in.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua ahih ciangin gal kido lai takin
Pasian in na kheempeuh uk hi.
Lau kei in Vantung mihing te in
Lampi tawp dongin nang a hong huh ding hi.
